questions.question: Define the relational algebra expression σ (X) R, where σ (X) denotes the selection operation and R is a relation. Provide an example of R and the result of σ (X) R.
Explain the difference between the relational algebra operations π (X) R and π (X, Y) R. Provide an example of each operation.

Consider a relation R = {(1, 'John', 25), (2, 'Alice', 30), (3, 'Bob', 20)}. Use relational algebra to find the number of students who are older than 25 years old. Express your query using π (X) R, σ (X) R, and π (X) σ (Y) R.
